TT. \ 11022/8/2010-ite l&l m^l ql ^ ] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th February, 2010 G.S.R. 84(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotics Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988) and in supersession of the Notification dated 14th February, 2007 issued vide G.S.R. 85(E), the Central Government hereby specialiy empowers Shri Anoop Kumar Srivaslava, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose of the said Section. [F. No. U. 11022/8/2010-PITNDPS] K.M.BRAHME,Dy.Secy. 657 Gl/2010 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, -- 1 of 1 --
